_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular Diagnosis of Neurofibromatosis by Multigene Panel Testing.

_contextSnippet: Histological and immunohistochemical analyses showed a dermal plexiform schwannoma with swill spindle cell changes and a strong and diffuse S100 staining.
details: Strong and diffuse S100 staining in dermal plexiform schwannoma tissue from NF2 patient
